---
title: "Tutorials"
format:
  html:
    toc: true
---

## Tutorial Modules

Tutorials provide step-by-step guidance through complete data analysis workflows. Each tutorial includes a problem set and solutions.

### Tutorial 1: Data Visualization with ggplot2

Learn fundamental data visualization principles and techniques using the ggplot2 package in R.

- [Problem Set](01_dataviz/tutorial_01_dataviz.Rmd)
- [Solutions](01_dataviz/tutorial_01_dataviz_solutions.Rmd)

### Tutorial 2: Exploratory Data Analysis with IPUMS Data

Explore and analyze large public use microdata from IPUMS, learning techniques for working with real-world health survey datasets.

- [Problem Set](02_eda_ipums/tutorial_02_ipums.Rmd)
- [Solutions](02_eda_ipums/tutorial_02_ipums_solutions.Rmd)

### Tutorial 3: Linear Regression Modeling

Build and interpret linear regression models using R, with practical applications to health data.

- [Problem Set](03_linear_reg/tutorial_03_linear_reg.Rmd)
- [Solutions](03_linear_reg/tutorial_03_linear_reg_solutions.Rmd)

### Tutorial 4: Logit and Probit Models

Master binary choice models for analyzing health outcomes and policy impacts.

- [Problem Set](04_logit_probit/tutorial_04_ldvs.Rmd)
- [Solutions](04_logit_probit/tutorial_04_ldvs_solutions.Rmd)

## How to Use These Tutorials

1. Each tutorial is organized in its own folder
2. Open the `.Rmd` file in RStudio
3. Work through the tutorial exercises in order
4. Run the code as you go to see the results
5. Refer to the solutions if you need guidance
6. Experiment with modifying the code and data to deepen your understanding

## Tips for Success

- Take your time and don't rush through the tutorials
- Try to understand each line of code, not just run it
- Experiment by changing parameters and observing results
- Work with the solutions only after attempting the problem set
- Use these tutorials as templates for your own analyses
